obs: Looking for discounted pre-owned luxury watches; interested in designer brands like Rolex, Patek Philippe; oscillates between luxury and budget spending.
Considering CPO programs vs. third-party resellers; interested in leather watch straps and high-quality options.

Interested in warbler identification during peak migration; seeking specific trails and guided tours at sanctuary.

Interested in publishing industry after panel discussion at literary festival on future of publishing; considering self-publishing platforms.

Improving bird photography skills; seeking close-up shots of skittish species like Northern Flicker; owns spotting scope.

Recently took Thai cooking class with sister; learned Pad Thai, Green Curry, Tom Yum from scratch; making Pad Thai weekly for lunch.
Age 32 (recently turned 32), intermediate fitness level, no health concerns; attending gym 3x/week for 1 month; goal: maintain overall health and flexibility.

Lost favorite silver necklace with small pendant at beach last weekend; left on towel during swimming.
Bringing grandmother's old gold earrings for repair (loose left backing); planning engagement ring professional cleaning every 6-12 months.

Exploring Buddhist teachings; practicing daily meditation; feeling more centered and calm; questioning former atheist identity.
Falling out with best friend from college (devout Christian) over God existence debate; attracted to spirituality over religiosity; embracing spiritual curiosity.

Travels frequently with hiking and work meeting activities; using packing cubes; carrying bulky hair dryer and straightening iron; planning snacks ahead.
Chicago-based; regularly performing at Zanies and Comedy Bar open mics; discovered The Comedy Clubhouse (1462 N Ashland, Wicker Park) Tues/Thurs 7:30pm signup.
Broke comedian tip: one-item minimum ($5-10) often waived with honest conversation; exploring more venues for stage time.
